name: Visual Novel Starter
description: Branching narrative visual novel with typewriter dialogue effects, character portraits with expression changes, choice menus for branching paths, background transitions, and affinity tracking per character.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x with physics set to 2D, default scene: res://scenes/title_screen.tscn, supported fonts for dialogue (Arial or custom)

scenes/.main_game.tscn: Node2D root with: ColorRect (background, 1920x1080), Sprite2D (background art, full-screen), CanvasLayer (ui), dialogue_box instance, choice_menu instance (hidden initially), character_left instance (portrait, x=200), character_right instance (portrait, x=1700), dialogue_manager instance (Node2D)
scenes/.dialogue_box.tscn: CanvasLayer with: ColorRect (semi-transparent black, bottom 25% of screen), Label (character_name, top-left, 32pt), Label (dialogue_text, left padding, 24pt, scrolling/typewriter effect), speaker indicator (optional), continue_indicator (down arrow animation, pulsing)
scenes/.choice_menu.tscn: CanvasLayer with: ColorRect (semi-transparent overlay), VBoxContainer or GridContainer (choice buttons), Button instances (dynamically created from choice_data), selection_index (tracks highlighted choice with keyboard/mouse)
scenes/.character_display.tscn: Sprite2D (portrait art, 400x600) with: position property for left/right, modulate for fade effects, expression property (happy/sad/angry/neutral/surprised), portrait_pack dict linking expression names to sprite frames/images
scenes/.title_screen.tscn: CanvasLayer with: ColorRect (background), Sprite2D (title art), Button (New Game), Button (Load Game), Button (Settings), Button (Gallery), Button (Quit)
scenes/.settings.tscn: CanvasLayer with: Panel (settings panel), Slider (text_speed: 0.05-0.5s per char), Slider (master_volume: 0-100), CheckBox (skip_unseen_text: true/false), CheckBox (auto_advance: true/false), Button (Back)
scenes/.save_load_screen.tscn: CanvasLayer with: GridContainer (save slots 1-10), SaveSlot scenes each with: Label (save_name), Label (timestamp), TextureRect (scene_thumbnail), buttons (overwrite/load/delete)
scenes/.gallery.tscn: CanvasLayer with: GridContainer (CG images unlocked), CG_image Control instances showing unlocked artworks, Label (CG name), grayed out if locked
scenes/.game_over.tscn: CanvasLayer with: ColorRect (black), Label (The End), Label (Final Affinity: Character_A: 75%), Button (Return to Title)

scripts/.dialogue_manager.gd: Node2D script (main controller). Properties: current_script_name, current_command_index, script_queue (array of dialogue commands). Methods: load_script(script_name) loads from dialogue_data/{script_name}.json, parse into command queue. _input on_continue_pressed (mouse click, Space, Enter) advance to next command. _process updates dialogue_box typewriter effect, character animations. execute_command(command) dispatches based on command.type: dialogue, choice, background, character, audio, transition, flag_set, affinity_add. Signals: script_loaded, command_executed, script_complete.
scripts/.script_parser.gd: Node script: parse_dialogue_json(file_path) reads JSON array, validates commands, returns structured array. Command format: { type: 'dialogue', character: 'alice', expression: 'happy', text: 'Hello there!' } | { type: 'choice', options: [ { text: 'Accept', next_scene: 'scene_02' }, { text: 'Decline', next_scene: 'scene_02_alt' } ] } | { type: 'background', image: 'res://art/bg_forest.png', transition: 'fade' } | { type: 'audio', sound: 'res://audio/bgm_main.ogg', type: 'bgm' } | { type: 'character', character: 'bob', action: 'appear', side: 'left', expression: 'neutral' } | { type: 'flag_set', flag: 'met_alice', value: true } | { type: 'affinity_add', character: 'alice', value: 10 }. Return parsed_commands array.
scripts/.character_display.gd: Sprite2D script: character_name, portrait_pack (dict mapping expression => image path), current_expression. Methods: load_character(name, pack_path) loads portrait_pack from JSON. set_expression(expression) changes Sprite2D texture to portrait_pack[expression]. set_position_side(side: left/right) positions x to 200 or 1700. fade_in(duration=0.5) Tween modulate alpha 0->1. fade_out(duration=0.5) Tween modulate alpha 1->0. Signals: expression_changed.
scripts/.choice_handler.gd: Node script: choice_menu ref, current_choices (array of {text, next_scene}). Methods: show_choices(choices_array) creates Button for each choice, displays choice_menu CanvasLayer. on_choice_selected(index) hide choice_menu, emit choice_made signal with next_scene. Keyboard input: arrow up/down navigate, Enter select. Mouse: click button select.
scripts/.save_manager.gd: Node script: save_dir ('user://vn_saves/'), save_data_template { game_time, current_script, command_index, character_affinity: {}, flags: {}, cg_unlocked: {} }. Methods: save_game(slot_index, name) creates save file JSON at save_dir/slot_{index}.json, stores current state. load_game(slot_index) reads save file, returns save_data. delete_save(slot_index) removes file. get_all_saves() returns array of save_data {name, timestamp, slot}. on_save_load emit signals to restore state.
scripts/.affinity_tracker.gd: Node script: affinity_dict { character_name: affinity_value }. Methods: add_affinity(character, value) increments affinity_dict[character] by value, clamps to 0-100. get_affinity(character) returns current value. on_dialogue_complete check flags and choice_made, apply conditional affinity gains. Signals: affinity_changed(character, new_value). Used for branching: if affinity['alice'] >= 50, show exclusive scene.
scripts/.audio_manager.gd: Node script: bgm_player (AudioStreamPlayer), sfx_player (AudioStreamPlayer2D), bgm_dict and sfx_dict preloaded audio streams. Methods: play_bgm(track_name, fade_in_duration=1.0) plays bgm_dict[track_name] with Tween alpha fade-in. play_sfx(sfx_name) plays sfx_dict[sfx_name]. stop_bgm(fade_out_duration=1.0) Tween alpha fade and stop. set_volume(category: bgm/sfx, volume: 0-100).
scripts/.transition_manager.gd: CanvasLayer script: animated background transitions. Methods: fade_transition(duration=0.5) ColorRect fades black from 0->1 and 1->0. dissolve_transition(duration=0.5, texture) shader-based dissolve effect. slide_transition(direction: left/right/up/down, duration=0.5) ColorRect slides in/out. apply_transition(type, duration, optional_params) dispatches transition type, animates color and texture. Signals: transition_complete.

dialogue_data/.scene_01.json: Array of commands: [{type: 'background', image: 'res://art/bg_home.png'}, {type: 'character', character: 'alice', side: 'left', expression: 'neutral'}, {type: 'dialogue', character: 'alice', expression: 'happy', text: 'Hello! Welcome to my home.'}, {type: 'choice', options: [{text: 'Nice to meet you!', next_scene: 'scene_02'}, {text: 'Where am I?', next_scene: 'scene_02_confused'}]}, {type: 'affinity_add', character: 'alice', value: 10}]

cg/.cg_ending_good.png: Unlocked CG image on good ending

preBuiltMechanics: Dialogue system with typewriter effect: text reveals character-by-character at configurable speed (0.05-0.5s per character)
Character portrait display with expression system: left/right positions, fade in/out, expression swapping via portrait_pack dict
Branching choices: displayed as buttons, each choice leads to next_scene script, affinity tracking per choice
Background transitions: fade, dissolve, slide animations between scenes
Affinity system: track per-character affinity (0-100), modify via dialogue choices and events, unlock special scenes at thresholds
Audio management: background music with fade-in/fade-out, sound effects on interactions
Save/load system: save game state at any dialogue point, load to resume, auto-save on critical choices
Flag system: set game state flags (met_character, item_obtained, etc.) to branch dialogue dynamically
CG gallery: unlock images on special scenes, display in gallery menu, track unlock status
Animation system: character fade in/out, background transitions, text speed adjustments
Continue indicator: pulsing arrow prompting player to advance dialogue
customizationPoints: Create new scripts: write dialogue_data/{scene_name}.json arrays with custom commands, define character expressions and branching paths
Design characters: create portrait_pack JSON mapping expressions to image files (neutral, happy, sad, angry, surprised, shocked, thinking, etc.)

Implement custom flags: define game state flags ({met_alice: true, obtained_key: false}) in dialogue commands, branch based on flag conditions (type: 'if_flag', flag: 'met_alice', true_scene: 'scene_x', false_scene: 'scene_y')
Add background scenes: create background artwork (1920x1080 PNG), reference in scene_*.json background commands
Create affinity thresholds: define scenes that unlock at affinity milestones (scene_romance_unlock at affinity >= 75), check in affinity_tracker.gd
Implement mini-games: add game_type command (type: 'minigame', game: 'rock_paper_scissors') that pauses dialogue, plays minigame, resumes with result-based branching
Build save system UI: display 10 save slots with thumbnails, modification dates, character affinity preview on hover
Add voice acting: extend audio_manager.gd to play character voice lines (type: 'voice', character: 'alice', text_key: 'scene_01_line_01'), sync with typewriter animation
examplePrompts: Create a 3-scene visual novel: Scene 1 introduces Alice at home, offers 2 choices (friendly/hostile). Each branch leads to unique Scene 2, both converge at Scene 3.
Implement a typewriter text effect that reveals dialogue at 0.05s per character with a subtle page-turn SFX on advance.
Design character portraits for Alice: neutral expression (calm), happy (smile), sad (tears), angry (frown); swap expressions based on dialogue context.
Build a branching dialogue system where choices at Scene 1 affect affinity (+10 for friendly choice, -5 for hostile), unlocking unique dialogue at Scene 3.
Create background transitions: fade to black (0.5s), load new background, fade from black (0.5s) on scene change.
Implement save/load: allow saving at any dialogue point, store script state, affinity values, and flags; restore on load.
Add affinity tracking: Alice starts at 0, friendly choices grant +10, hostile choices grant -5; show final affinity on end screen.
Design CG unlocks: special scene at high affinity (>=75) shows exclusive CG image, adds to gallery when viewed.
